llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced during 'Changes to the Agenda' section. Items 11 and 12 were both listed as 'Changes to the Agenda' on the posted agenda but appear to be duplicates. The meeting proceeded with standard agenda items.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Is there a motion to approve? I heard. Maria. Cecilia, was that a second from you? Yes. Okay, so Maria. Chrissy McBride. Aye. Christy Marquez. Aye. Aye. Vice President McAvoy. Aye. President Lawson. Aye.
